cover:
A clean, modern, high-tech comparison infographic illustrating "APEX CPU LIMIT ERRORS: The Real Fix: 5 Fake Fixes Teams Try vs The Real Transaction Design Approach".
Overall Layout: A split vertical column layout comparing the old way on the left and the new way on the right, divided by a subtle gradient vertical divider in the center.

Header:
- At the top, a bold, clean sans-serif headline: "APEX CPU LIMIT ERRORS: The Real Fix" in deep navy blue.
- Directly beneath, a smaller subtitle in dark gray: "5 Fake Fixes Teams Try vs The Real Transaction Design Approach".

Left Column (❌ FAKE FIXES — Masking the Problem):
- Header: "❌ FAKE FIXES — Masking the Problem" in a clear bold blue-gray box.
- Colors: Soft reddish and greyish pastel accents to denote complexity/inefficiency.
- Content Blocks:
  - A block for "Move everything to Queueable — same bad logic, more headroom" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Add @future — hides the issue, delays the crash" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Reduce debug logs — saves ~10ms, not 6,000ms" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Split batch size — increases total cost, fixes nothing" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Ask Salesforce for a limit increase — they won't" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Result: CPU hits 10,000ms, transaction rolls back, user sees error" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A central technical flow diagram showing tangled colored lines (representing complexity) between blocks, labeled with the most relevant components.

Right Column (✓ REAL FIX — Reduce Transaction Work):
- Header: "✓ REAL FIX — Reduce Transaction Work" in a clean bold bright blue box.
- Colors: Soft green and bright blue vector elements to represent efficiency, speed, and order.
- Content Blocks:
  - A block for "Map the full transaction: triggers + flows + packages + Agentforce" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Add CpuProbe checkpoints — find where CPU is actually spent" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Filter unchanged records before any loop or query runs" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Replace nested loops (O n²) with maps (O n+n)" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Move only non-critical work async — AI summaries, audit snapshots" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Result: 10,000ms failures → 2,800ms stable transaction" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A central technical diagram showing a beautiful, glowing central geometric node labeled "Single Source of Truth", with clean, straight, organized blue lines connected directly to key blocks.
  - A flat vector speedometer graphic labeled "FAST" with the needle pointing to the green zone.

Style Details: Clean vector illustration style, modern SaaS interface aesthetic, professional layout, flat design, high-quality typography, crisp lines, bright and professional tech color palette (deep navy, teal, bright blue, soft red, soft green, on a light blue-grey background), perfectly sharp rendering, zero text noise or spelling errors.
images:
A clean, modern, high-tech comparison infographic illustrating "CPU TRANSACTION ANATOMY: Every Layer That Shares Your 10,000ms Budget in a Modern Salesforce Org".
Overall Layout: A split vertical column layout comparing the old way on the left and the new way on the right, divided by a subtle gradient vertical divider in the center.

Header:
- At the top, a bold, clean sans-serif headline: "CPU TRANSACTION ANATOMY" in deep navy blue.
- Directly beneath, a smaller subtitle in dark gray: "Every Layer That Shares Your 10,000ms Budget in a Modern Salesforce Org".

Left Column (❌ UNOPTIMIZED TRANSACTION):
- Header: "❌ UNOPTIMIZED TRANSACTION" in a clear bold blue-gray box.
- Colors: Soft reddish and greyish pastel accents to denote complexity/inefficiency.
- Content Blocks:
  - A block for "Trigger handler processes ALL 200 records regardless of field changes" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Nested loop: 200 Accounts × 20,000 Contacts = 4,000,000 comparisons" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Query returns all open Cases — 800 records, 400 irrelevant" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Record-triggered Flow re-updates unchanged Cases, fires Case triggers" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "Agentforce 2.0 insight write happens synchronously in same transaction" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A block for "CPU hits 10,000ms → transaction rolls back → user sees failure" describing the old problem with a small icon.
  - A central technical flow diagram showing tangled colored lines (representing complexity) between blocks, labeled with the most relevant components.

Right Column (✓ OPTIMIZED TRANSACTION):
- Header: "✓ OPTIMIZED TRANSACTION" in a clean bold bright blue box.
- Colors: Soft green and bright blue vector elements to represent efficiency, speed, and order.
- Content Blocks:
  - A block for "Change detection first: 200 records → filter to 8 with real field changes" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Map lookup: O(n+n) — 200 + 20,000 passes, not 4,000,000 comparisons" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Selective SOQL: IsClosed = false AND status IN relevant set → 40 records" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Flow decision guard: entry criteria prevents re-processing unchanged records" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "Agentforce insight generation enqueued as Queueable — off critical path" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A block for "CPU lands at 2,800–4,000ms → transaction commits → user sees success" describing the modern solution with a clean icon.
  - A central technical diagram showing a beautiful, glowing central geometric node labeled "Single Source of Truth", with clean, straight, organized blue lines connected directly to key blocks.
  - A flat vector speedometer graphic labeled "FAST" with the needle pointing to the green zone.

Style Details: Clean vector illustration style, modern SaaS interface aesthetic, professional layout, flat design, high-quality typography, crisp lines, bright and professional tech color palette (deep navy, teal, bright blue, soft red, soft green, on a light blue-grey background), perfectly sharp rendering, zero text noise or spelling errors.
